name: The Summit High School: Prologue Episode
short_description: The Summit High School: Prologue Episode is a kinetic novel with mystery and horror elements.
detailed_description:
Lazy student Haruka, received a student invitation from the most prestigious high school in the world. But what he doesn't know is that this isn't actually a high school, and once you're sign in, it's impossible to get out. Let's see if Haruka and his friends can solve the mystery of this school?

*This game contains only the prologue episode of The Summit High School which consists of 4 episodes. The game is still in development and we plan to release the full game in the first half of 2022.

*The Summit High School: Prologue Episode is a kinetic novel with mystery and horror elements. (The full version of the game will include multiple routes.)

*Average 1 hour prologue gameplay.

*Great Soundtrack.

*Gorgeous backgrounds with beautiful anime characters.

*Rich Story.

This is a work of fiction. Names, characters, places, events are either products of the auhor's imagination or used in a fictitious manner. Any resemblance to actual persons, living or dead, or actual events is purely coincidental. Characters depicted in this game are 18 years of age or older.
